metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1691
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig1 Knockout of LRRK2 causes defects in synaptic vesicle endocytosis
Literal
"To determine whether this role in endocytosis is contained within the LRRK2
protein, we performed dynamic assays of endocytosis in wildtype and LRRK2-knockout primary striatal neurons by using sypHy, a fusion construct of synaptophysin and super ecliptic pHluorin. These results demonstrate that the role of LRRK2 in synaptic vesicle endocytosis"
Fig. 3 Knockout of LRRK2 affects neurotransmission by impairing presynaptic function
Literal: " To determine whether
knockout of LRRK2 affects neurotransmission, we measured the
number of spontaneous excitatory postsynaptic currents (sEPSCs) in
wild-type (n519) and LRRK2-knockout (n522) hippocampal
neurons: "To determine whether knockout of LRRK2 affects neurotransmission, we measured the number of spontaneous excitatory postsynaptic currents (sEPSCs) in wild-type (n519) and LRRK2-knockout (n522) hippocampal neurons.
"These data indicate that LRRK2 modulates synaptic function, as knockout of
LRRK2 causes impairment in neurotransmission following the release of the readily releasable pool."
Fig. 4 LRRK2 knockout mimics the effects of dynasore treatment
Literal "we compared the effect of LRRK2 knockout to the effect of independently blocking endocytosis. To block endocytosis we treated wild-type (control, n515; dynasore, n514) and LRRK2-knockout (control, n512; dynasore, n514) hippocampal neurons with dynasore (40 mM for 5 min, Fig. 4A), a cell-permeable small molecule that is a noncompetitive inhibitor of dynamin 1" "Pretreatment with dynasore abolished the effect of sucrose in wild-type neurons), but did not cause differences in LRRK2 knockout neurons (Fig. 4B).. Experimental description: KO LRRK2 mice and rats cultures were used
Literal from M&M:
"For the endocytosis assay and electrophysiology experiments, wild-type and homozygous LRRK2-knockout animals were used.
"Striatal cultures were generated from E17-19 embryos from wild-type
and LRRK2-knockout Long Evans rats"
